allow: Bash(node -e "const axios = require\('axios'\); axios.get\('https://steamcommunity.com/market/priceoverview/?currency=3&appid=730&market_hash_name=AK-47%20%7C%20Redline%20%28Field-Tested%29', { timeout: 10000 }\).then\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.data, null, 2\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('Error:', e.message, e.response?.data\)\)")
